title.rendered: Factors You Need To Look Before Buying A Milking Solution.

content.rendered:
Milk is something that everyone should drink on a regular basis. It provides you the required energy to perform different tasks. Milk plays an utmost important role in helping to have a healthy body. For many years, dairy farmers collect milk from cows. They follow the traditional way of collecting milk by using their hands; however, this used to take a lot of time. Therefore, now people use milking machines, which have made this process a lot more convenient.

Traditionally, two different methods were used by the farmers to extract milk from cows. Let us discuss those two methods.

Stripping

Under this method, the farmer uses a thumb and forefinger to grip the cow’s teat. Now, the farmer pulls down the teat to extract the milk. This is the best method to use if you want to get high fat milk but it takes time.

Full hand

Under this method, the farmers use all five fingers against the palm to get milk from the cow. By this method, a large amount of milk can be obtained. This is a simple method, there is not any requirement of special equipment.

Elements that need to be considered while selecting a milking solution

Efficiency and Productivity

The most important element is that the machine should be productive enough. Productivity here means that in one round, how much milk can be extracted by the machine. The more milk is extracted, the more productive the machine is. Therefore, productivity matters a lot as no one wants to invest in a thing that is not productive at all.

Longevity

Next crucial factor that needs to be taken into consideration is durability and longevity. Investment will be fruitful only if equipment lasts for a long time. If the equipment will last only for a few months, then it is useless to invest in that thing.

Easy Maintenance

The milk that is extracted needs to be clean and healthy; therefore, maintenance is must. However, maintenance should be easy to do, else it will become quite daunting for a dairy farmer to clean the machines.

Cost of Operation

The dairy farmer also needs to look for the operation cost. If a lot of labour is required for operating a machine, then it is not lucrative and if less labour is required, less electricity is needed, then it is a lucrative approach to buy that machine.

The above-mentioned points need to be taken into account if you are thinking of buying a milking machine. If the machine satisfies all four elements, then it is a feasible option to purchase that machine. Milking machine helps to extract milk in an easy way and due to the usage of this machine, a huge quantity of milk can be extracted in a short time.

At NK Dairy Equipments, you will get a milking machine that is not only productive, but will cost you less in terms of maintenance. Buying a machine from us is the best option and quite advantageous. We work to make your tasks easy through machines that is why deal in the best machines that last for a long time.

title.rendered: अपने डेयरी फार्म के लिए सही डेयरी उपकरण चुनने के लिए एक व्यवहारिक मार्गदर्शिका

content.rendered:
भारत में डेयरी फार्म की यात्रा को शुरू करने के लिए केवल गायों की ज़रुरत नहीं होती, डेयरी फार्म से जुड़े कुछ उपकरणों होते है, जिसके उपयोंग से भी आप अपनी डेयरी फार्म की यात्रा की शुरुआत कर सकते है | इस व्यवहारिक मार्गदर्शिका के माध्यम से आपको सही डेयरी उपकरण को चुनने के समय पर मुख्य बातों को जानने में मदद मिलेगी, जिससे आप भारत में डेयरी उपकरण निर्माताओं से यह तीन नेताओं की अंतदृष्टि पर ध्यान दे पाएंगे | आइये जानते है ऐसे डेयरी उपकरणों कितने प्रकार के होते है, जो दैनिक कार्यों में अपनी अहम भूमिका को निभाते है :-

डेयरी उपकरण कितने प्रकार के होते है ?

दूध दुहने वाली मशीन :- दूध देने वाली मशीन दूध देने की प्रक्रिया को स्वचालित करने में मदद करता है, जिससे मेहनत करने की आवश्यकता कम होती है और दक्षता को सुनिश्चित किया जा सकता है | इसलिए आप इस उपकरण के इस्तेमाल से अपने डेयरी फार्म की शुरुआत कर सकते है |

दूध को ठंडा करने वाली टंकी :- यह टैंक दूध को एकत्रित करके, उसे जल्दी से ठंडा करने का कार्य करता है, जिससे दूध की ताज़गी और मूल्य पोषण बरकरार रखने में मदद मिलता है | इसलिए आपको अपने फार्म में उत्पादित दूध की मात्रा के अनुसार टैंक की क्षमता, ऊर्जा दक्षता और ठंडा करने की गति का मुलायकान करना चाहिए |

पाश्चराइज़र :- पाश्चराइज़र एक ऐसा उपकरण है, जो दूध को गर्म करके हानिकारक बैक्टीरिया को ख़तम करता है और दूध की गुणवत्ता को बरकरार रखने में मदद करता है | इसलिए अपने डेयरी उत्पाद के लिए सटीक तापमान को नियंत्रण और उपयुक्त प्रंसस्करण क्षमता वाले पाश्चराइज़र का चुनाव करें |

मवेशी चारा उपकरण :- फीड मिक्सर, साइलेज़ कटर और कन्वेयर आपके मवेशियों के लिए ज़रूरी पोषण संबंधी संतुलित चारा को तैयार करने में और विपरीत करने में यह मवेशी चारा उपकरण काफी कारगर सिद्ध है | इसलिए ऐसे किसी उपकरणों की तलाश करें, जो आपके मवेशियों के लिए फीड व्यंजन अनुकूल हो और पोषण मूल्य को अधिकतम करे, इसके साथ ही फीडिंग प्रक्रिया को आसान बनाने में मदद करें |

यदि आप इससे जुड़ी अधिक जानकारी लेना चाहते है तो इसके लिए एनके डेयरी इक्विपमेंट संस्था से परामर्श कर सकते है | यह संस्था डेयरी फार्म से जड़े सभी उपकरणों के निर्माता है, जो भारत के सभी राज्यों में डेयरी फार्म से हुदे सभी उपकरणों का आपूर्तिकर्ताओं का कार्य करते है | इसलिए परामर्श के लिए आज ही एनके डेयरी इक्विपमेंट की वेबसाइट पर जाएं और अपनी अप्पोइन्मेंट को बुक करें, जिससे आपकी डेयरी फार्म से जुड़े सभी उपकरणों के बारे में संपूर्ण जानकारी प्राप्त हो जाएगी और सही मार्गदर्शन भी मिल जायेगा | इसके अलावा आप वेबसाइट पर दिए गए नंबरों से सीधा संस्था से संपर्क कर सकते है |

excerpt.rendered: भारत में डेयरी फार्म की यात्रा को शुरू करने के लिए केवल गायों की ज़रुरत नहीं होती, डेयरी फार्म से जुड़े कुछ उपकरणों होते है, जिसके उपयोंग से भी आप अपनी डेयरी फार्म की यात्रा की शुरुआत कर सकते है | इस व्यवहारिक मार्गदर्शिका के माध्यम से आपको सही डेयरी उपकरण को चुनने के समय पर मुख्य बातों को जानने में मदद मिलेगी, जिससे आप भारत में डेयरी उपकरण निर्माताओं से यह तीन नेताओं की अंतदृष्टि पर ध्यान दे पाएंगे | आइये जानते है ऐसे डेयरी उपकरणों कितने प्रकार के होते है, जो दैनिक कार्यों में अपनी अहम भूमिका को निभाते है :- डेयरी उपकरण कितने प्रकार के होते है ? दूध दुहने वाली मशीन :- दूध देने वाली मशीन दूध देने की प्रक्रिया को स्वचालित करने में मदद करता है, जिससे मेहनत करने की आवश्यकता कम होती है और दक्षता को सुनिश्चित किया जा सकता है | इसलिए आप इस उपकरण के इस्तेमाल से अपने डेयरी फार्म की शुरुआत कर सकते है | दूध को ठंडा करने वाली टंकी :- यह टैंक दूध को एकत्रित करके, उसे जल्दी से ठंडा करने का कार्य करता है, जिससे दूध की ताज़गी और मूल्य पोषण बरकरार रखने में मदद मिलता है | इसलिए आपको अपने फार्म में उत्पादित दूध की मात्रा के अनुसार टैंक की क्षमता, ऊर्जा दक्षता और ठंडा करने की गति का मुलायकान करना चाहिए | पाश्चराइज़र :- पाश्चराइज़र एक ऐसा उपकरण है, जो दूध को गर्म करके हानिकारक बैक्टीरिया को ख़तम करता है और दूध की गुणवत्ता को बरकरार रखने में मदद करता है | इसलिए अपने डेयरी उत्पाद के लिए सटीक तापमान को नियंत्रण और उपयुक्त प्रंसस्करण क्षमता वाले पाश्चराइज़र का चुनाव करें | मवेशी चारा उपकरण :- फीड मिक्सर, साइलेज़ कटर और कन्वेयर आपके मवेशियों के लिए ज़रूरी पोषण संबंधी संतुलित चारा को तैयार करने में और विपरीत करने में यह मवेशी चारा उपकरण काफी कारगर सिद्ध है | इसलिए ऐसे किसी उपकरणों की तलाश करें, जो आपके मवेशियों के लिए फीड व्यंजन अनुकूल हो और पोषण मूल्य को अधिकतम करे, इसके साथ ही फीडिंग प्रक्रिया को आसान बनाने में मदद करें | यदि आप इससे जुड़ी अधिक जानकारी लेना चाहते है तो इसके लिए एनके डेयरी इक्विपमेंट संस्था से परामर्श कर सकते है | यह संस्था डेयरी फार्म से जड़े सभी उपकरणों के निर्माता है, जो भारत के सभी राज्यों में डेयरी फार्म से हुदे सभी उपकरणों का आपूर्तिकर्ताओं का कार्य करते है | इसलिए परामर्श के लिए आज ही एनके डेयरी इक्विपमेंट की वेबसाइट पर जाएं और अपनी अप्पोइन्मेंट को बुक करें, जिससे आपकी डेयरी फार्म से जुड़े सभी उपकरणों के बारे में संपूर्ण जानकारी प्राप्त हो जाएगी और सही मार्गदर्शन भी मिल जायेगा | इसके अलावा आप वेबसाइट पर दिए गए नंबरों से सीधा संस्था से संपर्क कर सकते है |

title.rendered: औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट क्या होते है और यह कैसे काम करते है।

content.rendered:
औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट

औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट दुनिया के पानी को शुद्ध करने और इसको साफ़ करने के लिए एक महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका को निभाते है। दुनियभर में साफ़ और शुद्ध पानी सुनिश्चित करना बहुत ही ज्यादा महत्वपूर्ण है। औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट को एक क्रांतिकारी तकनीक माना जाता है, जो हाउसिंग सोसाइटियों, छात्रावासों, उद्योगपतियों, रेस्तरां और अस्पतालों के लिए स्वच्छ और शुद्ध पानी उपलब्ध करवा कर देती है जो एक वरदान साबित हुई है। इसका उपयोग उत्पादन के लिए ही नहीं बल्कि उपभोग के लिए भी किया जा सकता है | इसको बहुत ज़्यादा बहतर माना जाता है क्योकि ये पानी में घुले हुए ठोस पदार्थों, दूषित पदार्थों और अशुद्धियों को सफलतापूर्वक हटा देते हैं।

आरओ प्लांट क्या होते है?

आरओ का उद्देश्य रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस से है ,यह एक जल शोधन प्रक्रिया है जिससे जल से लवण, खनिज और बैक्टीरिया जैसे दूषित पदार्थ प्रभावी निकल जाते है ,ये पानी में घुली हुई अशुद्धियों को अलग करने के लिए एक अर्धपारगम्य झिल्ली का उपयोग करती है जिससे पानी को स्वच्छ, शुद्ध बना देता है ,यह झिल्ली के माध्यम से जल को गुजरने देता है,जबकि अशुद्ध पदार्थ पीछे छूट जाते है

आरओ वाटर प्लांट की आवश्यकता क्यों है?

आरओ पानी को शुद्ध बनाने का काम करता है ,आरओ प्रणाली का उपयोग कई तरह के प्रयोजनों के लिए किया जाता है जैसे की,

  • पेयजल के लिए (वह जल है जिसका उपयोग पीने या भोजन तैयार करने में किया जाता है)
  • डिसेलिनेशन: समुद्र के जल से नमक को हटाने की प्रक्रिया से पीने योग्य पानी बनाया जाता है इसका उपयोग व्यर्थ पानी के उपचार के लिए
  • संदूषकों की सांद्रता: यह पानी की मात्रा (धारा प्रवाह या बर्तन) में मौजूद संदूषक की मात्रा है जिसे प्रति इकाई द्रव्यमान या आयतन में व्यक्त किया जाता है।
  • घुले हुए खनिजों की दोबारा प्राप्ति, आदि के लिए

रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस सिस्टम कैसे काम करता है?

रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस सिस्टम पानी को एक कसकर बनी हुई अर्धपारगम्य झिल्ली के माध्यम से धकेलने के लिए दबाव का उपयोग करती है। जिससे सीसा, आर्सेनिक और नाइट्रेट से दूषित पदार्थ प्रभावी रूप से बहार निकल जाते है। पानी की अशुद्धियां दूर हो जाती हैं और जबकि साफ, बेहतर स्वाद वाला पानी आपके नल में उपयोग के लिए स्टोर किया जाता है।

ज़्यादातर आरओ सिस्टम में वह झिल्ली एक बहु-चरणीय निस्पंदन प्रक्रिया सिर्फ एक हिस्सा होता है जो पानी की गुणवत्ता को अधिकतम और प्रदर्शन के लिए ही डिज़ाइन किया गया है। ये काम कैसे करता है,

  • प्री-फिल्टरेशन : प्री-फिल्टरेशन में रेत, गाद या जंग जैसे बड़े कणों को पानी में से हटाने के लिए उनको पहले तलछट फिल्टर से गुजारा जाता है। यह कार्बन फ़िल्टर से भी गुजरता है जो क्लोरीन को लक्षित करता है और स्वाद और गंध को बेहतर करने में मदद करता है।
  • रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस: पानी दबाव में अर्धपारगम्य आरओ झिल्ली के बीच से आगे बढ़ता है, जो की परमाणु जैसे छोटे कणों को भी पानी से निकाल देता है इस प्रक्रिया दौरान, पानी में घुले हुए ठोस पदार्थों, और अशुद्धियों को हटा देता है।
  • पोस्ट-फिल्ट्रेशन : कुछ सिस्टमों में आपकी जल आवश्यकताओं के आधार पर PFAS, VOCs या फार्मास्यूटिल्स जैसे ख़ास दूषित तत्वों को निशाना बनाने के लिए अतिरिक्त फिल्टर या कार्ट्रिज शामिल होते हैं।

आरओ सिस्टम की प्रक्रिया क्या है ?

आरओ प्लांट की प्रक्रिया को समझना बहुत आसान है जैसे की आरओ वाटर सिस्टम में दो तरह के डिब्बे होते हैं जिसमें से पहला होता है, उच्च सांद्रता वाला पानी (जैसे समुद्री जल) और दूसरा कम सांद्रता वाला पानी (शुद्ध पानी) होता है। इन दोनों डिब्बों को अर्ध-पारगम्य झिल्ली द्वारा अलग किए जाता है।

उच्च स्तर का दबाव जब हम उच्च सांद्रता वाले पानी के डिब्बे पर डालते है तो पानी झिल्ली के माध्यम से कम सांद्रता वाले डिब्बे में चला जाता है, जो पानी हमारे द्वारा इकट्ठा किये जाने वाले पानी को रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस पानी कहते हैं।

आरओ प्लांट काम कैसे करता है?

  • पूर्व-उपचार चरण: पहले पानी को फ़िल्टर के जरिये आगे भेजा जाता है ताकि बड़े कणों, तलछट और क्लोरीन को पानी से निकला जा सके क्योंकि ये आरओ झिल्ली को नुकसान भी पहुंचा सकते हैं
  • उच्च दबाव पंप: पूर्व उपचार प्रक्रिया के बाद, उच्च दबाव पंप के माध्यम से पानी को गुजर जाता है ,जो इसे आरओ झिल्ली के माध्यम से गुजरता है। लगाया गया दबाव जल की गुणवत्ता के आधार पर अलग अलग होता है।
  • रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस मेंब्रेन: सिस्टम के मूल पर एक अर्ध-पारगम्य झिल्ली होती है,जो सूक्ष्म स्तर पर घुले हुए लवण, संदूषक और अशुद्धियों को में मदद करती है। ये झिल्ली केवल शुद्ध पानी के अणुओं को गुजरने की अनुमति देती है, जो ख़राब कणों को बाहर निकाल देती है.
  • उपचार के बाद का चरण: उपचार के बाद कैंसर के चरण या फिर जैव रासायनिक, झिल्ली प्रक्रियाओं में उपचार के बाद की प्रक्रिया का संकेत कर सकता है।
  • यूवी स्टरलाइजेशन ( बचे हुए बैक्टीरिया या वायरस को जड़ से खत्म करता है ।
  • पीएच समायोजन – औद्योगिक अनुप्रयोगों के लिए बेहतर पीएच स्तर को बनाए रखता है।
  • पुनः खनिजीकरण – जल की गुणवत्ता को ज्यादा करने के लिए आवश्यक खनिज जोड़ता है।
  • भंडारण और वितरण – यह एक निर्माता से अंतिम उपभोक्ता तक माल को स्टोर करने और ले जाने की प्रक्रिया है। यह सप्लाई चैन का एक महत्वपूर्ण हिस्सा है।

औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट के लाभ क्या है ?

  • इसको स्थापित करना और इसकी सेवा करना बहुत आसान है।
  • रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस की प्रक्रिया भरोसेमंद है।
  • यह आयनिक लवण, गैर-आयनिक, कोलाइडी पदार्थ, वायरस, जो क्रियाशील और निकिर्याशील बैक्टीरिया कप हटाता है और इसके साथ ही उच्च आणविक भार वाले कार्बनिक पदार्थों को निकलता है।
  • ये पुरे तरीके से स्वचालित प्रणाली है।
  • पेड़ -पौधों से लिया गया पानी पीने योग्य होता है।

औद्योगिक आरओ सिस्टम के प्रकार क्या है ?

औद्योगिक आरओ सिस्टम आम तोर पर कई प्रकार के होते है उनमें से ही कुछ है,

  1. 100 एलपीएच औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट
  2. 150 एलपीएच आरओ सिस्टम
  3. 200 एलपीएच आरओ प्लांट
  4. 250 एलपीएच आरओ प्लांट
  5. 350 एलपीएच आरओ प्लांट
  6. पुरे तरीके से ऑटोमेटिक 500 एल.पी.एच. आर.ओ. प्लांट।
निष्कर्ष :

औद्योगिक आरओ सिस्टम पानी को शुद्ध और साफ़ बनाते हैं और पीने योगय बनाते है ,और ये कई औद्योगिक उद्देश्यों के लिए वरते जाते है। अगर आप भी ऐसे ही औद्योगिक आरओ सिस्टम की ढूंढ रहे हैं या फ़िर इसकी जानकारी प्राप्त करना चाहते हैं तो आज ही एनके डेरी इक्विपमेंट कंपनी से सम्पर्क करें और जानकारी प्राप्त करें।

excerpt.rendered: औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट दुनिया के पानी को शुद्ध करने और इसको साफ़ करने के लिए एक महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका को निभाते है। दुनियभर में साफ़ और शुद्ध पानी सुनिश्चित करना बहुत ही ज्यादा महत्वपूर्ण है। औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट को एक क्रांतिकारी तकनीक माना जाता है, जो हाउसिंग सोसाइटियों, छात्रावासों, उद्योगपतियों, रेस्तरां और अस्पतालों के लिए स्वच्छ और शुद्ध पानी उपलब्ध करवा कर देती है जो एक वरदान साबित हुई है। इसका उपयोग उत्पादन के लिए ही नहीं बल्कि उपभोग के लिए भी किया जा सकता है | इसको बहुत ज़्यादा बहतर माना जाता है क्योकि ये पानी में घुले हुए ठोस पदार्थों, दूषित पदार्थों और अशुद्धियों को सफलतापूर्वक हटा देते हैं। आरओ प्लांट क्या होते है? आरओ का उद्देश्य रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस से है ,यह एक जल शोधन प्रक्रिया है जिससे जल से लवण, खनिज और बैक्टीरिया जैसे दूषित पदार्थ प्रभावी निकल जाते है ,ये पानी में घुली हुई अशुद्धियों को अलग करने के लिए एक अर्धपारगम्य झिल्ली का उपयोग करती है जिससे पानी को स्वच्छ, शुद्ध बना देता है ,यह झिल्ली के माध्यम से जल को गुजरने देता है,जबकि अशुद्ध पदार्थ पीछे छूट जाते है आरओ वाटर प्लांट की आवश्यकता क्यों है? आरओ पानी को शुद्ध बनाने का काम करता है ,आरओ प्रणाली का उपयोग कई तरह के प्रयोजनों के लिए किया जाता है जैसे की, पेयजल के लिए (वह जल है जिसका उपयोग पीने या भोजन तैयार करने में किया जाता है) डिसेलिनेशन: समुद्र के जल से नमक को हटाने की प्रक्रिया से पीने योग्य पानी बनाया जाता है इसका उपयोग व्यर्थ पानी के उपचार के लिए संदूषकों की सांद्रता: यह पानी की मात्रा (धारा प्रवाह या बर्तन) में मौजूद संदूषक की मात्रा है जिसे प्रति इकाई द्रव्यमान या आयतन में व्यक्त किया जाता है। घुले हुए खनिजों की दोबारा प्राप्ति, आदि के लिए रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस सिस्टम कैसे काम करता है? रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस सिस्टम पानी को एक कसकर बनी हुई अर्धपारगम्य झिल्ली के माध्यम से धकेलने के लिए दबाव का उपयोग करती है। जिससे सीसा, आर्सेनिक और नाइट्रेट से दूषित पदार्थ प्रभावी रूप से बहार निकल जाते है। पानी की अशुद्धियां दूर हो जाती हैं और जबकि साफ, बेहतर स्वाद वाला पानी आपके नल में उपयोग के लिए स्टोर किया जाता है। ज़्यादातर आरओ सिस्टम में वह झिल्ली एक बहु-चरणीय निस्पंदन प्रक्रिया सिर्फ एक हिस्सा होता है जो पानी की गुणवत्ता को अधिकतम और प्रदर्शन के लिए ही डिज़ाइन किया गया है। ये काम कैसे करता है, प्री-फिल्टरेशन : प्री-फिल्टरेशन में रेत, गाद या जंग जैसे बड़े कणों को पानी में से हटाने के लिए उनको पहले तलछट फिल्टर से गुजारा जाता है। यह कार्बन फ़िल्टर से भी गुजरता है जो क्लोरीन को लक्षित करता है और स्वाद और गंध को बेहतर करने में मदद करता है। रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस: पानी दबाव में अर्धपारगम्य आरओ झिल्ली के बीच से आगे बढ़ता है, जो की परमाणु जैसे छोटे कणों को भी पानी से निकाल देता है इस प्रक्रिया दौरान, पानी में घुले हुए ठोस पदार्थों, और अशुद्धियों को हटा देता है। पोस्ट-फिल्ट्रेशन : कुछ सिस्टमों में आपकी जल आवश्यकताओं के आधार पर PFAS, VOCs या फार्मास्यूटिल्स जैसे ख़ास दूषित तत्वों को निशाना बनाने के लिए अतिरिक्त फिल्टर या कार्ट्रिज शामिल होते हैं। आरओ सिस्टम की प्रक्रिया क्या है ? आरओ प्लांट की प्रक्रिया को समझना बहुत आसान है जैसे की आरओ वाटर सिस्टम में दो तरह के डिब्बे होते हैं जिसमें से पहला होता है, उच्च सांद्रता वाला पानी (जैसे समुद्री जल) और दूसरा कम सांद्रता वाला पानी (शुद्ध पानी) होता है। इन दोनों डिब्बों को अर्ध-पारगम्य झिल्ली द्वारा अलग किए जाता है। उच्च स्तर का दबाव जब हम उच्च सांद्रता वाले पानी के डिब्बे पर डालते है तो पानी झिल्ली के माध्यम से कम सांद्रता वाले डिब्बे में चला जाता है, जो पानी हमारे द्वारा इकट्ठा किये जाने वाले पानी को रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस पानी कहते हैं। आरओ प्लांट काम कैसे करता है? पूर्व-उपचार चरण: पहले पानी को फ़िल्टर के जरिये आगे भेजा जाता है ताकि बड़े कणों, तलछट और क्लोरीन को पानी से निकला जा सके क्योंकि ये आरओ झिल्ली को नुकसान भी पहुंचा सकते हैं उच्च दबाव पंप: पूर्व उपचार प्रक्रिया के बाद, उच्च दबाव पंप के माध्यम से पानी को गुजर जाता है ,जो इसे आरओ झिल्ली के माध्यम से गुजरता है। लगाया गया दबाव जल की गुणवत्ता के आधार पर अलग अलग होता है। रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस मेंब्रेन: सिस्टम के मूल पर एक अर्ध-पारगम्य झिल्ली होती है,जो सूक्ष्म स्तर पर घुले हुए लवण, संदूषक और अशुद्धियों को में मदद करती है। ये झिल्ली केवल शुद्ध पानी के अणुओं को गुजरने की अनुमति देती है, जो ख़राब कणों को बाहर निकाल देती है. उपचार के बाद का चरण: उपचार के बाद कैंसर के चरण या फिर जैव रासायनिक, झिल्ली प्रक्रियाओं में उपचार के बाद की प्रक्रिया का संकेत कर सकता है। यूवी स्टरलाइजेशन ( बचे हुए बैक्टीरिया या वायरस को जड़ से खत्म करता है । पीएच समायोजन – औद्योगिक अनुप्रयोगों के लिए बेहतर पीएच स्तर को बनाए रखता है। पुनः खनिजीकरण – जल की गुणवत्ता को ज्यादा करने के लिए आवश्यक खनिज जोड़ता है। भंडारण और वितरण – यह एक निर्माता से अंतिम उपभोक्ता तक माल को स्टोर करने और ले जाने की प्रक्रिया है। यह सप्लाई चैन का एक महत्वपूर्ण हिस्सा है। औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट के लाभ क्या है ? इसको स्थापित करना और इसकी सेवा करना बहुत आसान है। रिवर्स ऑस्मोसिस की प्रक्रिया भरोसेमंद है। यह आयनिक लवण, गैर-आयनिक, कोलाइडी पदार्थ, वायरस, जो क्रियाशील और निकिर्याशील बैक्टीरिया कप हटाता है और इसके साथ ही उच्च आणविक भार वाले कार्बनिक पदार्थों को निकलता है। ये पुरे तरीके से स्वचालित प्रणाली है। पेड़ -पौधों से लिया गया पानी पीने योग्य होता है। औद्योगिक आरओ सिस्टम के प्रकार क्या है ? औद्योगिक आरओ सिस्टम आम तोर पर कई प्रकार के होते है उनमें से ही कुछ है, 100 एलपीएच औद्योगिक आरओ प्लांट 150 एलपीएच आरओ सिस्टम 200 एलपीएच आरओ प्लांट 250 एलपीएच आरओ प्लांट 350 एलपीएच आरओ प्लांट पुरे तरीके से ऑटोमेटिक 500 एल.पी.एच. आर.ओ. प्लांट। निष्कर्ष : औद्योगिक आरओ सिस्टम पानी को शुद्ध और साफ़ बनाते हैं और पीने योगय बनाते है ,और ये कई औद्योगिक

title.rendered: Modern Milking Parlour Designs Every Dairy Farmer Should Know

content.rendered:
In the era of advanced dairy farming, effectiveness and productivity are more prominent than ever. At the heart of every prosperous dairy establishment is an artfully crafted milking parlour– an area where technology and innovation blend expertly with the conventional method of milking.

With a firm commitment to offering convenience to animals, workforce ease, and the utmost milk yield, the accurate milking parlour structure can significantly propel your dairy business to new heights. In this essential guide, we will understand what milking parlour designs entail, the critical factors impacting their choices, and some noteworthy tips to boost their efficiency and overall productivity.

Exploring milking parlour structures

Milking parlour designs are recognised as the precise layout and structure of the space where dairy cows are milked. These solutions are crafted to simplify the milking procedure, prioritise animals’ well-being, and enhance the workforce’s productivity. Depending on your dairy function’s size and objectives, these structures can vary from ordinary, easy setups to highly modernised systems.

Standard categories of milking parlours encompass:

  • Herringbone parlour:

By standing in a V-shaped arrangement, cows enable the workforce to collect the udders from the side.

  • Parallel parlour:

In this design, cows are positioned closely together, enhancing space efficiency and also facilitating prompt access.

  • Rotary parlour:

A circular, rotating platform where the herds are milked as the platform rotates–is the favourable choice for enterprises with extensive operations.

  • Robotic milking parlour:

Envision a scenario where cows are milked through advanced automated systems, entirely eliminating the need for human intervention. This transformative technology enhances operational effectiveness and animal welfare.

Selecting the appropriate design significantly heightens your productivity level and the overall health of your herd.

Factors impacting your milking parlour choices

Choosing an effective milking parlour layout for your dairy farm is not a multipurpose decision. Below are the significant indicators that play a paramount role:

  • Farm scale and herd strength

The quantity of cows in your herd is a significant aspect of determination. When handling larger herds, integrating rotary or robotic parlours becomes crucial for fostering milking efficiency.

  • Budget constraints

Your overall budget will reflect whether you choose manual, semi-automated, or highly upgraded milking designs. Relying on NK Dairy Equipments’ budget-friendly, easily accessible options ensures that you receive the worth of every penny.

  • Workforce accessibility

Farms with limited employees might consider automated or fully robotic parlour designs to eliminate human efforts, whereas those with certified workers can depend on old-age systems.

  • Milking frequency

The daily milking sessions required for your herd play an imperative role in optimising the parlour’s overall capacity and operational pace.

  • Future expansion plans

If you manifest herd strength, opting for a design that can provide shelter to additional cows without substantial modifications.

  • Animal convenience

A healthy, calm cow yields a higher quantity of milk. Layouts that reduce excessive reliance on animals and offer a hassle-free environment should always be considered.

Proven tips to enhance milking parlour efficiency

To reap the best out of your milking parlour, dive into these beneficial tips to optimise greater productivity and efficiency:

  • Boosting workflow

Place your milking parlours so that they help reduce the walking distance for employees and the cows. Clear pathways and well-arranged machines can save time and minimise burden.

  • Providing essential training to the staff

Certified and highly experienced workers who acknowledge the proper functions of milking machines and other equipment are more significant assets to your business. In-depth training sessions can enhance productivity and mitigate adverse errors.

  • Prioritising hygiene

A pristine environment is essential to facilitating premium-grade milk production. Make sure your milking machines, parlours, and storage areas are regularly cleaned to avoid contamination and prioritise healthy udders.

  • Observe cow behaviour

Closely track your herd’s comfort and mood in the milking session. Calm, comfortable cows offer a good amount of milk, so be sure the ambience is exceptionally calm and inviting.

Invest in success with NK Dairy Equipments

With NK Dairy Equipments by your side, you’re not just investing in a milking parlour, you’re investing in your success. Our expert guidance and top-notch equipment ensure that you’re equipped to meet your specific operational needs. Give us a call and get an ideal quote today.

Enable NK Dairy Equipments to guide you through establishing a state-of-the-art milking parlour that fulfils your specific operational needs. We have everything from expert assistance to top-notch equipment to transform your farming journey. Give us a call and get an ideal quote today.

Transform your dairy farm with specialised assistance and world-class equipment from NK Dairy Equipments. Connect with us today to craft the outstanding milking parlour for your business.

title.rendered: Benefits Of Using Digital Technologies In The Dairy Sector

content.rendered:
Revolution using technology

Milk is a part of life. This is something that everybody drinks daily, either by adding it to tea or coffee. But do you ever think about how the milk is formed and what steps it goes through before coming to your glass? The milk formation has been in use for centuries in traditional ways. There was a time when the farmers had to handle all the steps manually, such as stripping from cows and stirring large quantities for delivery purposes.

Due to the digital technology that has been introduced for dairy products, it has been way easier than before for farmers to ensure that they are storing and delivering milk using smarter and more efficient ways.

What is the iSmart Milk Analyser?

This is a machine that can be used for different purposes and tells about the condition of the dairy products in a shorter period of time. You can use this machine to make sure that you are able to analyse how much fat is present in the milk in 20- 30 seconds. Not only this, the machine can also be of great help in making you be aware of if there is any water added in the milk or you can identify the presence of bacteria that could be caused due to any substance. The fact that these components should be evaluated is unknown to many. Therefore, understanding you can ensure that these aspects are taken care of for an efficient butter churner is an essential aspect.

How does iSmart Milk Analyser work?

There are many ways that are helpful in making certain that the machine works in an efficient way. Let’s review what steps take place when storing milk.

  • The very first step is to evaluate factors like the presence of fat, bacteria, or water in order to be certain that the steps are followed properly to move further.
  • You must be thinking that identifying several aspects at the same time takes a long time. But the answer is 30 seconds. Within a shorter period of time, you can ensure that you are examining every part of the milk to check the quality, and you can keep the receipt of the quality that is delivered by the analyser.
  • With the use of a , you can make certain that you are able to store data online so that it makes no confusion or mistake for further processing. This step is of great help in ensuring that the record is taken care of or for future reference if needed.

Why should you opt for iSmart Milk Analyser?

There are many reasons why this machine stands out among other methods. Let’s dive into some of them.

  • Expedited and detailed testing

Using this technology, you can avail yourself of the privilege of using a machine that operates for 30 seconds to give results with detailed information without compromising the quality of testing in a shorter period.

  • Self-operating

You can be assured that you do not have to worry about manually entering the data or recording the analysis. You can have a peace of mind knowing that it is taken care of using technology which also avoids blunders that could be made by persons.

  • Equitable remuneration

You should not overlook the fact that this is the method that makes you pay fairly to the farmer. This machine tells you how much should be paid to the farmer by evaluating the fat, water and SNF in the milk. This is how you can save money and ensure you are not paying more or less to the farmer.

What can you expect from NK Dairy Equipment?

You can ensure that you are adapting to the techniques that promote safety, speed, and smart services using dairy products. If you are looking for any dairy product including iSmart milk analyser or butter churner machine, you can contact NK Dairy Equipment, so that you are provided with the best options available at reasonable prices with the best quality.

title.rendered: How Milk Analyzers Work

content.rendered:
Milk testing is essential in the food production and distribution industry because it helps to maintain safety and quality standards without contamination, but how can we determine that? Do not worry. NK Dairy Equipments has all the dairy-related machines, from milking and cheese-making machines to milk analyzers. Here, we will discuss the importance of milk testing machine and milking analyzers.

 

Milk Analyzer

A milk analyzer is a highly improved dairy equipment that works on the principle of ultrasonic technology and infrared spectroscopy; it helps determine the composition of milk to ensure that it is consumer-safe and quality milk. With the help of ultrasonic or infrared technology, the milk analyzer analyzes the lactose, protein and fat in the milk.

Types Of Milk Analyzers

There are four different types of milk analyzers, and each functions differently. Let us look at these two types of milk analyzers/milk testing machines and discuss them.

  1. The ultrasonic milk analyzer works on ultrasonics. It is suitable for raw, fresh and homogenized milk. It works faster and more accurately to determine the composition of milk from the fat, protein and even added water.
  2. Infrared milk analyzers use spectroscopy to analyze the milk composition, including the lactose, water content and fat. They are usually used in the labs for quality control.

Common Dairy Products

There are numerous dairy products that we use in our household kitchens and restaurants, and there are ways in which they are particularly made. These dairy products not only enhance our dishes but also have nutritious value. Here are some of those dairy products that we will discuss, and we will start with cream.

Cream

There are many types of creams, and that depends on the fat content that each contains, but let us talk about how cream is made. Fat is less dense; in this case, milk is not homogenized, meaning the milk composition is prone to separate so it will collect on the top, and in order to achieve a higher percentage of fat that can be used for the production of cream, it is centrifuged in a machine that separates the liquid from the fat, and the fat on top is removed as cream. Afterwards, it is pasteurized or fermented, depending on the cream created. Cream varies in fat content and taste, and some vary in colour.

 

Butter

Butter is made from cream. The cream is taken and churned into a machine or whisked up until it changes colour and gets agitated. The cream will start changing colour, which means the fat is separating, forming soluble butter clumps whilst it leaves behind water, also known as buttermilk. Then, as it solidifies, it has to be washed until clean and then shaped; salt is optional, depending on the type of bacteria being made.

These machines have made life much easier because they get to measure and determine the composition of milk accurately and in no time. Gone are the days when we would do an eye test just by looking and judging with our eyes. If you are a dairy farmer, these machines do come in handy and can ease your job.

title.rendered: All About Butter Churns

content.rendered:
Who does not like to eat butter in their meals? Butter is very important and quite good for your health. It is used in various edible items like people using butter in Butter Chicken, Dal Makhani, Mustard Curry and many more dishes. Even people apply butter on Chapatis and bread to eat.

The butter churner machine is used widely all over the world to make butter. This machine makes butter quickly as it works on a rapid frequency. Using these butter churners is the new trend, earlier the trend was of using butter vessels to make butter. These vessels were used between the era of 6500-5500 BC. However, at that time, it was difficult to make butter with the help of butter vessels. It used to take time.

There were other ways also for making butter in the past. Another technique was to collect cream which is present in boiled or chilled milk. Then, that collected cream is mixed with yogurt. After the container is full, it is stored in the fridge for a few days. After taking out the container from the fridge, blend the batter, and butter is ready.

Another method is filling a bag with milk and shaking it vigorously till it turns into butter. It is also an ancient method used by the people, and in many regions, this method is still used. By undertaking this method, a person gets exhausted easily. It is done manually; no machine is used to shake.

The butter churner machine encompasses churning barrel beaters, drive (it consists of a gearbox and electric motor), drive support (known as steel legs), buttermilk drain, air release cook, end flanges, and door (that is lockable).

Types of Butter Churn

One can find a lot of butter churns in the market. One of them is an old vertical butter churn. It is made of wood that has a staff that moves up and down. A person inserts the staff into the churn and moves it up and down.

Another type is steel churn of Ireland. It is made of stainless steel and in old times, this was used by people to make butter.

Next churn is the paddle churn which has a handle. The handle is turned manually and by doing so the butter gets churned in the barrel only that is attached to the handle. As the paddles of a cycle work, in the same way the handle of this butter churn works. The handle needs to be turned frequently.

The churning process of butter has been made easy with the help of a butter churning machine. Using a butter churning machine has a plethora of benefits. Let us discuss those one by one.

Quality: With the help of a butter churning machine, the quality of the butter can be controlled which is the best feature of a butter churning machine.

Temperature Control: In some butter churns, the ideal temperature is maintained automatically for the butter churning.

Easy to Use: It is quite easy to use butter churns and empty them. However, it was difficult to use old equipment for butter churning as a lot of energy is required to churn the butter through those equipment.

Safe: Using a butter churning machine is quite safe as it can be controlled, and safety comes first when it comes to using a machine.

Efficiency: The most important advantage of using a butter churn machine is that it converts cream into butter quickly.

We at NK Dairy Equipments provide you with the best butter churning machine. We believe in delivering quality products and services to satisfy the customers of your business. As long as the customers are happy, only then a business can flourish. Moreover, buying equipment that ensures good quality of products is the best.

title.rendered: 5 Reasons Why You Should Opt For Bulk Milk Cooler To Store Milk

content.rendered:
Importance of Bulk Milk Cooler

It is one of the most useful dairy equipment that helps with handling milk storage without wasting it. Milk storage is an essential aspect, especially for dairy farmers who keep putting efforts into milk production, and when it doesn’t convey efficient results, this is a disappointment for farmers that can lead to financial loss or customer dissatisfaction. This is highly beneficial in eliminating the risk of bacteria development, which can be hazardous for everyone who consumes milk.

What is a Bulk Milk Cooler?

This is equipment that plays a crucial role in storing milk that is available in large quantities and maintaining the cooling temperature of it, which otherwise can lead to spoilage. When mentioning cooling the milk in ample amounts, you must be thinking that it would take a long time. However, it is the other way around; it implies the cooling temperature of the milk within a short period of time, like 1 – 2 hours.

Reasons why you should choose bulk milk cooler to reduce waste

There are many reasons why manufacturers should opt for a bulk milk cooler in order to maintain efficiency. Let’s review some of the factors that contribute to selecting it.

Great help in maintaining milk safety

When thinking of milk quality and safety, the very first thing to be kept in mind is cooling the milk and keeping it away from bacterial growth. This is when the bulk milk coolers come into play by preserving the quality of the milk through swift cooling, which ultimately leads to the reduction of potential harm.

Constant temperature control

You can enjoy the privilege of cooling milk at an even temperature for all the parts with the use of a bulk milk cooler. Understanding how this dairy equipment helps in preserving all the parts is an essential aspect.

Maintaining cleanliness

If they are able to preserve the safety of large quantities of milk, it doesn’t mean they are hard to clean. However, it is important for you to know that cleaning is not a challenge; it is an easy task instead. The presence of stainless steel that is used to make it makes certain that it is able to be cleaned thoroughly without food contamination. You can also make sure that its stainless steel doesn’t let it get damaged after several uses.

Modern technology

A modern operation named BCM makes certain that you are able to monitor it thoroughly without making it a bigger complication. You can take advantage of alarms that are highly beneficial in informing about the real state of the milk. It also warns you if any of the spoilage is about to happen so that you can identify the problem and offer a solution.

Time and effort-saving

Another advantage is saving time and effort, which is what sets it apart from others. You do not need to worry about handling or transferring it to the tank, which saves energy and time. Also, you need a person to do the task. You can do all of it on your own. There is a high chance of milk waste when it involves manual work.

How NK Dairy Equipments can be of great help

A bulk milk cooler is equipment that saves the efficiency of dairy products, and we understand how important it is to keep them in a well-preserved state. Therefore, we offer the best quality bulk milk coolers as per the need. Contact NK Dairy Equipments today!

title.rendered: Technologies That Have Benefited Farmers In Dairy Field.

content.rendered:
Milk is extremely important to drink, and milk products are also extremely important. A maximum amount of milk is produced in India; therefore, a lot of milk-based products are available here in the market. Every parent encourages their children to have dairy products as these are highly beneficial for the growth and development of the child. India’s Gross Domestic Product also depends heavily on milk products.

 

However, farmers encounter a lot of difficulties as the population is escalating, and the lifestyles of people are changing a lot. Moreover climate change is also a factor that is responsible for creating problems for farmers. A little time ago, farmers used to face the problem of not having enough milk and dairy products for the people, but now the main issue is offering essential nutrients to the people. Farmers need to manage a plethora of things; therefore, it becomes quite daunting for them to look after everything properly.

Some technologies introduced which has benefited farmers a lot and have made their work convenient

Smart Solutions for Dairy Farmers

Milking machine

The introduction of this machine plays an imperative role in making the life of farmers easier, as with the help of this machine, farmers are able to produce more milk that can satisfy the needs of more people. In fact, the contamination is eliminated by this machine to a great extent. Farmers do not need to worry about the safety and comfort of their animals due to this machine. These types of dairy equipment are the best to have.

Dairy farm management application:

Animal-wise data recording

The breed is improved with this application. In-breeding is stopped, and due to this, healthcare measures are taken. Moreover, it also helps keep track of cattle’s key performance indicators.

Ration balancing program

It is extremely important for the cattle to be healthy. If the cattle are not healthy enough, they will not be able to produce enough milk for the people, which will also result in having fewer dairy products for the humans. Through this application, the exact feed requirements of the farmers can be traced, and they can feed them accordingly. Owing to this, there will not be the problem of overfeeding or under-feeding. Therefore, it is best to ensure the good health of animals.

Alerts

With this application, farmers also get alerts that allow them to take action on time. Having such an application is truly a blessing, and this has resulted in lessening the load on the farmers as well.

 

Nowadays, bulk milk coolers are also something that farmers use a lot. Under this, milk is stored in the cooler to cool down the milk from 35 degrees Celsius to 4 degrees Celsius. This has benefited farmers a lot. The life of farmers has become quite easy due to modern dairy equipment.

 

If you are looking for a place where you can get all types of dairy equipment that can help you a lot in the production of milk and dairy products, then come to NK Dairy Equipment. We provide the best machines that last for a long time so that your work becomes easy.

title.rendered: How Milk Machines Enhance The Production And Efficiency Of Milk

content.rendered:
Keeping livestock can be quite a daunting task, especially if it is for commercial purposes, because there is a specific health standard that has to be met first. Dairy farming is also a cumbersome job, but in today’s world, it has evolved quite a lot from the old days of milking manually till today, where automatic milking machines are now preferred. Here, we will discuss the benefits of using a cow milking machine and the production of some products.

 

Why An Automatic Milking Machine Is Recommended

  • The most potent reason milking machines are recommended is their speed and efficiency; they operate faster than humans.
  • Cow milking machines are cost-effective; thus, you can reduce the number of skilled workers and labour costs as they won’t require a lot of hands to operate.
  • Milk machines have shown excellent quality production as they reduce contamination and ensure smooth and consistent milk production.
  • These milking machines are gentle on animals and reduce animal stress.
  • It is safer as hands may cause some injuries to cows. Milking machines have rubber liners that will protect the cow’s teats.
  • They can milk multiple cows simultaneously, making managing large herds much easier.

Most Used Dairy Products

We use numerous dairy products in our household kitchens and restaurants, and there are specific ways in which they are produced. These dairy products not only enhance our dishes but are also nutritious. Here are some of the dairy products and how they are made. Let us start with milk.

 

Milk

Firstly, before milking, the cows’ udders are cleaned in case there is dirt; milk is then collected from the cow’s udders manually or automatically by a cow milking machine; this is done in clean and sanitary conditions to prevent contamination. The milk is then cooled to avoid the rapid growth of bacteria and collected and filtered to remove dirt. After removing dirt, milk is heated to a specific temperature, which is called pasteurisation. It kills harmful bacteria; any other step after this is optional.

 

Cheese

Milk is heated or boiled to kill microorganisms, and this process is referred to as pasteurising. After cooking, add lemon juice or vinegar; this will help separate milk curdles from whey. Usually, the curd will be on the top layer, and the whey will be on the bottom. Cut the curd into pieces with a knife, then separate it from the whey by draining it with a cheesecloth. Squeeze as much as you can, leaving the curd to form a ball-like appearance. Last, add salt to enhance preservation and taste, shape and leave it to age.

 

Cost Of Automatic Machines

title.rendered: Milk Analyser’s Benefits To The Indian Dairy Industry

content.rendered:
For the last half a century, the improvement the Indian dairy industry has seen is remarkable because it has risen from facing a critical shortage of milk to reaching the list of leading milk producers worldwide. The credit for these improvements goes not only to government initiatives but also to farmers being educated in the field, artificial insemination, milk fat testing machines, veterinary services and better feed given to the dairy livestock. Despite all these measures, the problem of farmers not being paid fairly cannot be overlooked. Especially in rural areas where milk is sold to the collection centres by the farmers, who pay after measuring the FAT in milk and the machines they use are not always correct because they sometimes manipulate the results to reduce the payment.

Issues currently faced by the Indian dairy industry

 

  • Many milk collection centres lack cleanliness. Consequently, milk analyser machines show unreliable readings of FAT and SNF.
  • Machine malfunctioning affects the payment that is received by farmers.
  • In places where FAT reading is done manually when the milk analyser doesn’t work, farmers can’t ensure that they are receiving fair income.
  • A malfunctioned milk analyser requires high maintenance costs as well.

The solution to these issues is to rely on quality products that are easy to operate and require low-cost maintenance. There are plenty of companies that provide products people can rely on, and their milk analyser prices are reasonable as well. Companies like NK Dairy Equipments assist milk processing plants in installing milk fat testing machines and guide them regarding cleaning maintenance. Due to this, farmers also get fair prices for milk production. A smart milk analyser is another solution that can aid in improving the situation.

Smart milk analyser’s features

  • The smart milk analyser can be operated and cleaned effortlessly, providing accurate FAT and SNF readings.
  • Power consumption is lower and suitable for any weather condition.
  • A smart milk analyser can be operated by using a mobile app, which is used only by those who have access permission.
  • The option to store the history of milk analysis is also available in a smart milk fat testing machine.
  • As the main operator can allot the authority to anyone, farmers can also check it through their devices.

Smart milk analysers can bring a better future for the Indian dairy industry as they will help farmers earn fairly, and milk collection centres can also get myriads of benefits. That includes:

  • No more manual reading due to malfunctioning of milk analysers.
  • Accurate FAT and SNF measurements can lead to better-quality milk products.
  • Stored data from previous readings can help analyse production quality.
  • The better and smoother operation makes it a cost-effective product as well.

Milk analysers and other dairy equipment have aided in improving the Indian dairy industry to a large extent, but still, it is facing plenty of obstacles that can be overcome by adding smart milk analysers to the plans along with helping farmers to improve milk production by guiding them in regard with better feed for animals, services taken from vets and ways to operate milk fat testing machines effectively.

title.rendered: Which essential measures to take care of while maintaining the dairy plants?

content.rendered:
Commencing your business with the ghee plant and the milk processing plant is not an easy task. For that, you have to work quintessentially hard and have to take all the things into account whether it is related to the installation of the new equipment or the replacements of the previous one. Maintenance always emerges as a huge challenge for dairy owners.

In this Blog, we shall be discussing the points on how to make the running of the dairy plant.

Cleanliness Of The Equipment

When are is about maintenance then cleanliness is something that emerges in our mind in the first place. Since if the machines will be kept clean, then there are quintessentially higher chances that they will never encounter any problem.

Lubricate Regularly

The machines sometimes get stuck in the functioning. To keep the moving part running smoothly, you must consider lubricating it on the daily basis. Do not consider any lubricant around the world. Make sure you are choosing the one which is suggested by the manufacturers.

 

Do Not Overload The Machine

Do not take the optimum utilization of the machine as he is the one who is supposed to be overloading the machine. Make sure you are utilizing the machine up to the extent to which it comes out with the maximum productivity, but do not overexert the machine.

 

Get The Equipment Maintained By The Professionals

No doubt you also know how you can efficiently maintain the equipment, but you have to make sure that you are taking the help of the professionals to get it maintained at least once a year.

 

Get Updated With The New Versions Of The Equipment You Are Having

As we know equipment is something that keeps on evolving based on its structure and functionality. So you must keep yourself updated with the changes that are incurred in the equipment. These changes will help you to know whether the latest version will help to yield as much production as compared to these or not.

 

Keep The Surroundings Clean

When we are talking about the maintenance of the dairy plants, then we are not only talking about the installed equipment. Rather we are also considering the surrounding area. If your surroundings will be clean then you’ll never encounter any attack of the pests and the other insects.

 

Get Your Dairy Plant Done With The Pest Control

It is essential for you not to compromise with the health of the individuals, For that you are suggested to get the pest control done at least once a year. As the dairy paint is supposed to be manufacturing the milk and the milk-based products, see you surely can’t bear the attack of the pests and when it will happen you will not be able to find in the bulk of the milk whether these have affected it or not.

 

Bottom Line

This is just 30 percent of the information on the topic of airy plant maintenance. If you want to get more information on this topic, it is suggested that you should let us know. We shall be providing you with tons of information to keep your dairy plant maintained.

title.rendered: Explore Cheese Making Process with NK Dairy Equipments

content.rendered:
The most common phrase that makes people smile without noticing when they want to take a picture is “Say cheese.” Jokes aside, cheese is loved and used by many people. Some dishes are incomplete without cheese; what is comfort food without cheese? Here, we will discuss the cheese-making process and everything you need to know.

 

Introduction of cheese

Cheese is a dairy product made from milk. Milk is fermented with the help of bacteria that break down lactose into lactic acid. Cheese has a soft, salty, butter-like, sour and savoury flavour, and its tanginess completes most dishes like lasagna. Most European dishes include cheese, like pasta, Alla Ruota, which originated in Italy. It is made by adding steaming hot pasta into a hollowed cheese wheel. Nowadays, people make cheese boards when hosting events or even small get-togethers. A cheese board is a platter that includes different cheeses, fruits and meats and is served as an appetiser. Some people are lactose intolerant, meaning that they can have stomach-related issues after consuming anything that has dairy or dairy products in it.

Top 2 Cheesy dishes you should try

  1. Nachos is a tasty Mexican dish made of tortilla chips covered with cheese sauce. Some go the extra mile of adding olives to the dish, but it is the best.
  2. White sauce cheesy pasta is a French dish with a twist: cheese is added to the bechamel sauce.

Key steps of the making process

Milk is heated or boiled to kill microorganisms, and this process is referred to as pasteurising. After cooking, add lemon juice or vinegar; this will help separate milk curdles from whey. Usually, the curd will be on the top layer, and the whey will be on the bottom. Cut the curd into pieces with a knife, then separate it from the whey by draining it with a cheesecloth. Squeeze as much as you can, leaving the curd to form a ball-like appearance. Last, add salt to enhance preservation and taste, shape and leave it to age.

 

Cheese making machine

The cheese making machine has made everything easy because of its automated features that allow significant quantities to be produced. Cheese-making machines allow less contamination because of their features. It produces perfect consistency; depending on the machine, it can produce different cheese varieties. The machine works more efficiently than humans because it can squeeze all the whey and separate it from the curd. It is a good investment because it requires no labour since it is automated. It has improved quality precision, such as temperature when boiling the milk or pH when determining acidity.

 

Why struggle to find the perfect consistency of your cheese when you can purchase your automated cheese-making machine at NK Dairy equipment? Say no to all the stress and toiling around to find recipes online. Using a cheese-making machine is difficult, but it produces cheese without degrading its nutritional value. Our equipment is tested, approved, and trusted by big manufacturing industries. We ensure quality, durability, and safety in our equipment.

title.rendered: Functioning And Benefits Of Cream Separator Machines

content.rendered:
Almost everyone drinks milk on a regular basis to have good health. Not only this but milk is also used to make dairy products that are highly nutritious and good for the body. You must have always heard your mother’s suggestion to have paneer, cheese, khoya, and butter, as these play an imperative role in maintaining a person’s good health. One common thing is that cream is the basic thing one requires to make all these products. This cream is separated from the milk, but some find the task of separating the cream from milk a bit difficult. Therefore, the question now is how to do this. The answer is a cream separator machine.

Cream separator machine works with the help of centrifugal force. It easily separates cream from the milk and then the machine turns the milk into skimmed milk. In the bygone era, this work was done manually, no machines were used at that time. However, at that time, cream was used for the feeding purpose for livestock. When people realised the potential of using cream for making different dairy products, factory owners and industrialists began to use it to make dairy products and sell them in the market.

Why cream separator machines?

Making dairy products in factories for a large number of people can not be done manually as it takes a lot of time and effort. Therefore, people started preferring milk cream separator machines. These machines made the task quite easy. Even the large leading companies use these machines to make dairy products.

Functionality of cream separator machine:

  • First, the separator rotates and when it is being rotated, the milk that is put into the machine, which is heavy, is pulled towards the wall, in this way, cream is created and this cream is collected in the middle part of the machine.
  • Then, in spouts, the milk and cream are separated.
  • After this, one gets the skimmed milk and cream, which are twisted together in specific ratios.
  • These are mixed slowly slowly till one gets the desired fat content.

How much fat content should be there in the cream, this depends on whether one wants low-fat, full-fat or full cream milk. Depending on that fat content is decided.

Benefits of cream separator machine:

Large amount of cream: It is quite beneficial to use milk cream separator as a large amount of cream can be made and used for making dairy products. For industrialists, these machines are boon.

Good quality cream: By using these machines, one gets cream of good quality, in other words, one gets the cream that has a good taste and texture.

More productivity: Another most important benefit of using these machines is that they enhance productivity as these are automatic and can create large amounts of cream which results in more profit for the businessmen. These are cost effective as well.

NK Dairy Equipments is the best supplier of cream separator machines, which is lucrative for your business. Wanting the best cream separator machine for your business, then what are you waiting for, come to us and order the machine now. You will feel satisfied with these machines as these will generate a good amount of profit for you.

title.rendered: Benefits Of Eating Paneer

content.rendered:
People make a lot of different things with milk, like paneer, curd, khoya, and other things. These things are highly nutritious and good for a person’s health. Many people even do business selling these things in the market. To make these things in bulk, people need different machines. Various machines are available in the market to make these things, like khoya mawa-making machines, butter churners, curd-making machines, milk-cooling tanks, paneer-cutting machines, paneer presses and many more.

A paneer press machine is quite useful in making paneer as the excess whey from the curdled milk is squeezed out. You can use this machine in small-scale and large-scale industries. Let us now shed light on how this machine works:

  • Firstly, pressure is applied to the milk by the machine. This removes the excess whey.
  • When the excess whey is removed, the machine itself maintains the structure of the paneer.
  • One can make paneer of the desired size and texture with the machine.

Benefits of eating paneer:

Reduced risk of cancer

Cancer is becoming quite a common disease nowadays. A plethora of women are facing the problem of breast cancer; however, this can be prevented by eating edible items that are rich in vitamin D and calcium, and paneer contains both nutrients in high amounts.

Better bones and teeth

Vitamin D is quite useful in strengthening the bones, and paneer contains vitamin D and calcium in huge amounts. Calcium helps the nervous system function normally.

Boost digestive system

It is extremely important for the digestive system to be in normal condition. If the food is not digested properly, then a person faces a lot of problems. Paneer also has phosphorus and magnesium and both are helpful in improving the digestive system.

Good for diabetic patients

Paneer has magnesium and the blood sugar level is regulated by this. It is low in carbohydrates that is why it is good for diabetic patients. Moreover, the fluctuations in the blood glucose level is also controlled.

Strong immune system

For young descendents, paneer is extremely pivotal. Paneer helps to have a strong immune system. Hemoglobin production also gets improved by the consumption of paneer. The intellectual ability of children also gets sharp as they are able to memorise things for a long time and the concentration power also gets boosted by the intake of paneer.

Helps to protect from diseases

Even the blood pressure is controlled by the consumption of paneer as it contains potassium. Women during the menopause stage suffer from cramps problem; however, if these women consume paneer on a daily basis, then they can save themselves from facing this problem. It also has a high amount of zinc which is effective in having normal sperm count in males. Not only this, paneer also helps to prevent stroke.

Building muscles

Paneer is quite useful in building muscles. Paneer is a good source of protein that is why many vegetarians who want to build muscles prefer to have paneer.

At NK Dairy Equipments, we deal with all machines like butter churners, curd-making machines, khoya-making machines, paneer cutting machines, and paneer presses. The paneer press manual and pneumatic paneer press both machines are available, so you can choose the one that suits you. We give durable machines at reasonable prices.

title.rendered: A Comprehensive Guide: The Art Of Dairy Farm Business

content.rendered:
India is the largest milk producer with up to 21% of production globally. Dairy farming has many sides and aspects such as rearing, breeding, milking of animals and sheep surrounding this industry. As the industry embraced the advancement of technology to optimise the product quality, milk yield and animal welfare.

 

Running a dairy farm business is a huge responsibility, it is not about just looking at the animals. The main job is to showcase how you were good at taking care of animals, knowing what to feed animals, and understanding how to keep them healthy. You know how to deal with hard challenges and you must also know how to do business, sell milk etc. In this blog we will discuss the dairy farm business and its process challenges and many more.

 

Dairy farming is a fluctuating business and, at the same time, rewarding venture, but it requires careful planning and implementation. There is a need for a strategic approach and a deep-rooted passion for animal husbandry. From an idea or concept in your mind to execute the planning and introduction of the product or service in the market. We will discuss every facet of dairy farming, including the pros and cons, and provide essential insights for both established and newcomers starting a dairy business. We provide you with tips to make your dairy business successful.

 

Key Requirements for Dairy Farm Business

 

It’s essential to have good infrastructure and resources to make your dairy farm successful. There is a need for a solid plan if you want to make your dairy business lucrative and golden. To run a business, workforce and capital are needed to get started. You can start your business with a small investment and then grow. Where you sell the milk, you can be close to those places, and taking care of sick animals is beneficial in the long run.

Following are some of the key elements you need to pay attention to when you are setting up a dairy farm:

  • Land: Sufficient space for grazing, housing and infrastructure.
  • Water: Adequate amount of livestock and cleaning.
  • Infrastructure: Milking parlour, barnes and storage facilities.
  • Capital: Investment in livestock, animals and operating expenses.
  • Labour: There is a need for skilled workers in animal care. Milking and management.

Types Of Dairy Farms

There are different types of dairy farms depending on your scale, investment, location resources, etc.

  • Small-scale Dairy Farms: On this scale, the main focus is to sell to the customer and in local markets directly.
  • Large-Scale Dairy Farms: On a large scale, milk is distributed and produced through dairy cooperatives.
  • Organic Dairy farms: In these dairy farms, the organic natural practices take place.
  • Pasture-based Dairy Farms: Farming relies on significant portions of the cow’s diet.

Milking process and equipment

To ensure efficient and hygienic milk production, it is vital to invest in high-quality milking equipment. Stick to clean, sanitary practices, as milking dairy animals is a daily chore, and it needs clean conditions and the right equipment. Make sure that the milk is safe and healthy to drink. It is essential for the dairy farmers to use the special machines that gently extract the milk. It is essential that everything should be super clean. After milking, it is stored in big cold tanks and kept fresh until it is sent to the market or factory.

The whole process should be transparent and one needs to make sure that every operation is carried out carefully. Animals should be comfortable while milking and the milk is of high quality.

Marketing and Selling your Dairy Products

By developing effective marketing strategies, you can reach the target audience by delivering delicious and fresh milk to the world. You can either sell the milk directly to the customers, or to the shops or sell it to big companies such as cheese and butter-making companies. Another way is to sell the milk to other farmers. You can also sell your own milk products like cheese, butter, ice cream, etc. With digitalisation, you can sell your products through online platforms and reach a large number of customers. This will give your business a unique push and expand its growth.

Consider options such as:

  1. Direct-to-consumer sales
  2. Value added products
  3. Dairy Cooperatives
  4. Online platforms

Dairy farming is rewarding as well as challenging the nature of business at the same time. But if you have knowledge and dedication towards the dairy business, you can crack it and gain growth. Embracing sustainable practices to take care of animals’ health and selling healthy and high-quality milk in the market plays a vital role in this business. Prioritising animal welfare and building a successful dairy farm, high-tech machines that are efficient and provide hygienic milk production are required. If you have a dairy farm or are seeking the best tech machines that give efficient results and make your products well renowned and of high quality, then NK Dairy Equipments is here to offer you the latest technology dairy equipment that makes your work easier and provides the best quality dairy products.

title.rendered: खोया बनाने वाली मशीन की प्रक्रिया और जाने कैसे यह मशीन बना रही है हर काम को आसान ?

content.rendered:
एन.के. इक्विपमेंट ने अपने यूट्यूब चैनल में पोस्ट एक वीडियो के माध्यम से खोया बनाने वाले मशीन की प्रक्रिया को दिखाया गया | इस वीडियो में यह भी बताया गया कि एन.के. इक्विपमेंट ने मावा और खोया बनाने वाली मशीन की प्रक्रिया को व्यवस्थित करने के लिए डिज़ाइन किया है | पंजाब में खासकर यह मशीन सटीकता के साथ निपुणता को जोड़ता है, जिसके परिणाम हर बार लगातार निसंदेह होते है | चाहे आपने खोया का उत्पादन छोटी मात्रा में करना हो या फिर बड़े पैमाने में यह मशीन हर स्तर के विनिर्माण इकाई में उत्पादन करने की आवश्यकतों को पूरा करने के लिए आदर्श समाधान है |

एन.के. इक्विपमेंट ने यह भी बताया की इस मशीन का निर्माण खोया के निर्माण के दौरान आने वाले जटिलताओं को देखकर ही किया गया है, जिसकी मदद से आप न्यूनतम कोशिशों के साथ उत्तम उत्पाद को प्राप्त कर सकते है | गर्म करने से लेकर हिलने तक और ठंडा करने से लेकर आकर देने तक हर कदम पर इस मशीन को सहज़ता के साथ डिज़ाइन किया गया है, जो विश्वशनीय प्रदर्शन और गुणवन्ता से भरपूर उत्पादन की गारंटी देता है |

 

यदि आप भी अपने डेयरी व्यवसाय के लिए ऐसे ही खोया बनाने वाली मशीन की खोज कर रहे है तो इसमें एन.के. इक्विपमेंट आपकी पूर्ण रूप से मदद कर सकता है | इस संस्था के पास डेयरी व्यवसाय से जुड़ी हर तरह के लेटेस्ट उपकरण और नयी टेक्नोलॉजी उपलब्ध है, इसके साथ ही यह संस्था आपको डेयरी व्यवसाय से जुड़ी विषय के बारे में संपूर्ण जानकारी प्रदान करने में आपकी मदद कर सकते है | इसलिए आज ही एन.के. इक्विपमेंट नामक वेबसाइट पर जाएं और दिए गए नंबरों से संपर्क करें |

 

इससे जुड़ी अधिक जानकारी के लिए आप दिए गए लिंक पर क्लिक करें और इस वीडियो को पूरा देखें | इसके अलावा आप एन.के. इक्विपमेंट नामक यूट्यूब चैनल पर भी विजिट कर सकते है | इस चैनल पर आपको इस विषय संबंधी संपूर्ण जानकारी पर वीडियो प्राप्त हो जाएगी |

title.rendered: बजट-अनुकूल दूध देने वाली मशीन से बढ़ाएं अपने डेयरी फार्म का मुनाफा

content.rendered:
कई वर्षों से डेयरी फार्म से जुड़े किसान गायों से दूध को इकट्ठा करने के लिए पारंपरिक तरीकों का प्रयोग करते आ रहे है, जबकि यह प्रक्रिया एक समय लेने वाली और थकावट देने वाली होती है | तकनिकी में हुए उन्नत की वजह से अब दूध देने मशीनों का उपयोग से डेयरी फार्म के किसान के लिए दूध को इकट्ठा करना और इसे वितरित करना बेहद आसान हो गया है | छोटे पैमाने वाले डेयरी फार्म से जुड़े किसानों को प्रत्येक दिन कई तरह के वित्तियों बाधाओं से गुजरना पड़ जाता है | इसके अलावा पूंजी की कमी, पशुओं के स्वास्थ्य का ख़राब होना, बढ़ती हुई क्रिया संचालन लगात, कम स्तर में उत्पादकता, वित्त-संबंधी सहायता की कमी होना और महंगे उपकरण आदि भी इन वित्तियों बाधाओं में शामिल होते है |

भारत में डेयरी फार्म को एक आवश्यक वस्तु की तरह माना जाता है, इसलिए इन किसानों के पास किफायती और आधुनिक समाधानों का मौजूद होना बेहद ज़रूरी होता है, जो उनके संचालन को बेहतर बनाने में और लाभदायक बने रहने में मदद करता है | एक किफायती और उच्च गुणवत्ता से भरपूर दूध देने वाली मशीन सभी समस्यों के सरल समाधान के लिए सक्षम होती है | इन मशीनों का निर्माण गायों से कुशलतापूर्वक, स्वच्छतापूर्वक और कम समय में दूध को निकलने के लिए किया गया है | हाथ से गायों से दूध निकलने में समय भी काफी व्यर्थ होता था और क्रिया संचालन लागत भी काफी बढ़ जाती थी | आइये जानते है बजट-अनुकूल दूध देने के समाधान का चुनाव करते हुए किन बातों का ध्यान देना बेहद ज़रूरी होता है |

बजट-अनुकूल दूध देने के समाधान का चुनाव करते हुए किन कारकों पर ध्यान देना होता है आवश्यक

छोटे पैमाने में डेयरी फार्म करने वाले किसानों के लिए दूध देने वाली मशीन की खरीदारी में एक महत्वपूर्ण निवेश हो सकता है | इस मशीन से न केवल उनके खेत की उत्पादकता बढ़ेगी, बल्कि लंबे समय के लिए अच्छे परिणाम भी प्राप्त होंगे | हालाँकि इस मशीन को खरीदने से पहले, इससे जुड़े कुछ कारकों पर ध्यान देना बेहद ज़रूरी होता है, जिनमें शमिल है :-

  • कुशलता और उत्पादकता :- सबसे पहले किसानों को इस बात पर ध्यान देना चाहिए की यह मशीन एक बार में कितने लीटर दूध को निकाल सकती है | यदि यह अधिक मात्रा में दूध को निकलती है तो इसका यह मतलब यह है बाकी की तुलना में इस मशीन की उत्पादन सबसे अधिक है |
  • टिकाऊपन और लंबी उम्र :- दूध देने वाली मशीन को खरीदना एक छोटे पैमाने वाले किसानों के लिए, एक बहुत बड़ा निवेश हो सकता है, लेकिन यह मशीन आने वाले कई सालों तक अच्छे परिणामों को प्रदान कर सकती है |
  • देखभाल में आसानी :- दूध देने की प्रक्रिया में स्वच्छता को बनाए रखने और मशीन साफ़-सफाई करने में आसान होनी चाहिए | इसके साथ ही बार-बार मुरम्मत को करवाने की ज़रुरत न पड़े, जिसकी वजह से खर्चा बढ़ सकता है |
  • क्रिया संचालन लागत :- किसानों को मशीन का उपयोग करने के लिए, इससे जुड़े कई तरह के क्रिया संचालन लागत पर ध्यान देना चाहिए, जैसे की श्रम और बिजली का शुल्क आदि शामिल है |

यदि आप ही ऐसे ही मशीन की खरीदारी के बारे में सोच रहे है और इस विषय से जुड़े पूर्ण जानकारी को प्राप्त करना चाहते है तो इसमें एनके डेयरी इक्विपमेंट संस्थान आपकी पूर्ण रूप से मदद कर सकता है | यह संस्था डेयरी फ़ार्म से जुड़े सभी तरह के उपकरणों के निर्माता है और पूरे भारत में इन उपकरणों में आपूर्तिकर्ताओं का कार्य ही करते है | इसलिए चयन के लिए आज की एनके डेयरी इक्विपमेंट की ऑफिसियल वेबसाइट पर जाएं अपनी अप्पोइन्मेंट को बुक करें, ताकि आपको इस विषय संबंधी पूर्ण जानकरी प्राप्त हो सके है | आप चाहे तो वेबसाइट में मौजूद नंबरों से सीधा संपर्क कर अपने विचार विमर्श कर सकते है |

excerpt.rendered: कई वर्षों से डेयरी फार्म से जुड़े किसान गायों से दूध को इकट्ठा करने के लिए पारंपरिक तरीकों का प्रयोग करते आ रहे है, जबकि यह प्रक्रिया एक समय लेने वाली और थकावट देने वाली होती है | तकनिकी में हुए उन्नत की वजह से अब दूध देने मशीनों का उपयोग से डेयरी फार्म के किसान के लिए दूध को इकट्ठा करना और इसे वितरित करना बेहद आसान हो गया है | छोटे पैमाने वाले डेयरी फार्म से जुड़े किसानों को प्रत्येक दिन कई तरह के वित्तियों बाधाओं से गुजरना पड़ जाता है | इसके अलावा पूंजी की कमी, पशुओं के स्वास्थ्य का ख़राब होना, बढ़ती हुई क्रिया संचालन लगात, कम स्तर में उत्पादकता, वित्त-संबंधी सहायता की कमी होना और महंगे उपकरण आदि भी इन वित्तियों बाधाओं में शामिल होते है | भारत में डेयरी फार्म को एक आवश्यक वस्तु की तरह माना जाता है, इसलिए इन किसानों के पास किफायती और आधुनिक समाधानों का मौजूद होना बेहद ज़रूरी होता है, जो उनके संचालन को बेहतर बनाने में और लाभदायक बने रहने में मदद करता है | एक किफायती और उच्च गुणवत्ता से भरपूर दूध देने वाली मशीन सभी समस्यों के सरल समाधान के लिए सक्षम होती है | इन मशीनों का निर्माण गायों से कुशलतापूर्वक, स्वच्छतापूर्वक और कम समय में दूध को निकलने के लिए किया गया है | हाथ से गायों से दूध निकलने में समय भी काफी व्यर्थ होता था और क्रिया संचालन लागत भी काफी बढ़ जाती थी | आइये जानते है बजट-अनुकूल दूध देने के समाधान का चुनाव करते हुए किन बातों का ध्यान देना बेहद ज़रूरी होता है | बजट-अनुकूल दूध देने के समाधान का चुनाव करते हुए किन कारकों पर ध्यान देना होता है आवश्यक छोटे पैमाने में डेयरी फार्म करने वाले किसानों के लिए दूध देने वाली मशीन की खरीदारी में एक महत्वपूर्ण निवेश हो सकता है | इस मशीन से न केवल उनके खेत की उत्पादकता बढ़ेगी, बल्कि लंबे समय के लिए अच्छे परिणाम भी प्राप्त होंगे | हालाँकि इस मशीन को खरीदने से पहले, इससे जुड़े कुछ कारकों पर ध्यान देना बेहद ज़रूरी होता है, जिनमें शमिल है :- कुशलता और उत्पादकता :- सबसे पहले किसानों को इस बात पर ध्यान देना चाहिए की यह मशीन एक बार में कितने लीटर दूध को निकाल सकती है | यदि यह अधिक मात्रा में दूध को निकलती है तो इसका यह मतलब यह है बाकी की तुलना में इस मशीन की उत्पादन सबसे अधिक है | टिकाऊपन और लंबी उम्र :- दूध देने वाली मशीन को खरीदना एक छोटे पैमाने वाले किसानों के लिए, एक बहुत बड़ा निवेश हो सकता है, लेकिन यह मशीन आने वाले कई सालों तक अच्छे परिणामों को प्रदान कर सकती है | देखभाल में आसानी :- दूध देने की
